posts.author: Flaviomian (Flavio Mian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello Community!

Would like to suggest anoter date filter that is for column date-based. Today we can filter dates by:

Past:
-Yesterday,
-Last Week,
-Last Month,
-Past Dates

Present:
-Today,
-This Week,
-This Month

Future:
-Tomorrow,
-Next Week,
-Next Month,
-Future Dates,

As you can see there’s a various forms of filtering dates, but no filter for a Yearly based filter.

A countermeasure would be filter this way:
Where date column “Is Between” (Date1) and (Date 2) → this way I can select JAN 1ST and DEC 31TH, and with that, view the results of an entire year.

What are you trying to achieve

With Yearly filter such as “This Year” and “Last Year” we could easily create dashboards showing the year results of the company.

posts.author: AdamLM (Adam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Second this feature. To add why it’s important: Most of my work revolves around a fiscal year. Most of my projects last more than a month. It is common for me to need to filter by “one year ago” (and I imagine many in the corporate world).

The year filter is also pretty standard in most project management software, so don’t feel like this is going out on a limb.
